_comment: Edit MACs to match your boards and (x, y) coordinates in meters to match your room. Origin doesn't matter — only relative positions do. `txs` is a list; for a single transmitter use a one-element list. `room` may be either {width_m, height_m} for a rectangle or {polygon: [[x,y], ...]} for arbitrary shapes (e.g. L-shaped rooms). For non-convex polygons, list corners in walking order around the perimeter.
